question: Does the wealth concentration branch now resolve toward design/rule conflict under volatility or correlation/transmission failure when the bounded US asset-regime case is compared directly against the private-credit resilience-squeeze case?

expected_outputs.description: At least one synthesis comparing variants or nodes

notes: Compared the bounded rule-conflict and transmission-focused sub-branches directly. The branch still reads as hybrid, with design/rule conflict currently the stronger bounded lead and transmission the stronger long-run challenger.
